languages.text: {n}Погрузившись в молчание на несколько секунд, Экзальт-117 наконец изрекает: {/n} "Ваше замечание отличается поразительной точностью. Выстраиваю новую траекторию движения".
{n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."
languages.original_text: {n}Погрузившись в молчание на несколько секунд, Экзальт-117 наконец изрекает: {/n} "Ваше замечание отличается поразительной точностью. Выстраиваю новую траекторию движения".

traits.locale_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."
{n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."
{n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

languages.text: {n}沉默了几秒钟之后，尊使-117终于宣布，{/n}“你的判断出乎意料地准确。正在构建新的行动轨迹。”
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}沉默了几秒钟之后，尊使-117终于宣布，{/n}“你的判断出乎意料地准确。正在构建新的行动轨迹。”

languages.text: {n}Après un long moment de silence, Exalt-117 finit par déclarer :{/n} « Votre remarque se distingue par son étonnante justesse. Calcul d'une nouvelle trajectoire de déplacement. »
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après un long moment de silence, Exalt-117 finit par déclarer :{/n} « Votre remarque se distingue par son étonnante justesse. Calcul d'une nouvelle trajectoire de déplacement. »

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniye sessizliğe gömüldükten sonra Yüce-117 nihayet konuşuyor.{/n} "Yorumunuz, şaşırtıcı derece doğru olmasıyla dikkate değer. Yeni bir hareket rotası oluşturuluyor."
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniye sessizliğe gömüldükten sonra Yüce-117 nihayet konuşuyor.{/n} "Yorumunuz, şaşırtıcı derece doğru olmasıyla dikkate değer. Yeni bir hareket rotası oluşturuluyor."

languages.text: {n}Tras un lapso de silencio de varios segundos, Exaltado-117 declara por fin:{/n} «Su comentario destaca por su sorprendente precisión. Construyendo una nueva trayectoria de movimiento».
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras un lapso de silencio de varios segundos, Exaltado-117 declara por fin:{/n} «Su comentario destaca por su sorprendente precisión. Construyendo una nueva trayectoria de movimiento».

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er mehrere Sekunden lang geschwiegen hat, erklärt Exalt-117 schließlich: {/n} "Euer Kommentar ist ob seiner erstaunlichen Präzision bemerkenswert. Konstruiere eine neue Bewegungstrajektorie."
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er mehrere Sekunden lang geschwiegen hat, erklärt Exalt-117 schließlich: {/n} "Euer Kommentar ist ob seiner erstaunlichen Präzision bemerkenswert. Konstruiere eine neue Bewegungstrajektorie."

languages.text: {n}数秒間沈黙した後、エクサルト117はついに宣言する。{/n}「あなたのコメントは、驚くほど正確である。新たな軌跡を構築する。」
languages.original_text: {n}After lapsing into silence for several seconds, Exalt-117 finally declares, {/n} "Your comment is notable for its surprising accuracy. Constructing a new trajectory of movement."

traits.locale_text: {n}数秒間沈黙した後、エクサルト117はついに宣言する。{/n}「あなたのコメントは、驚くほど正確である。新たな軌跡を構築する。」
